previousIssues: polyfill loading relied on runtime eval(require) and silent swallow
async storage loading relied on runtime eval(require)
ensureSignedIn session bootstrap catch was effectively debug-only
currentUserId session bootstrap catch returned null silently

changes.change: replaced runtime eval(require) with static import of react-native-url-polyfill/auto
changes.whySafe: does not change auth semantics; only removes CSP-sensitive dynamic loading

changes.change: replaced runtime eval(require) async-storage loading with static AsyncStorage import for native branch
changes.whySafe: keeps the same Supabase auth storage contract while removing dynamic runtime loading

changes.change: session check failures now emit explicit observability event ensure_signed_in_session_check_failed
changes.whySafe: fallback behavior is unchanged: false is returned and login redirect still happens

changes.change: router redirect import failure now emits ensure_signed_in_router_redirect_failed
changes.whySafe: still best-effort, but no longer silent

changes.change: session read failure now emits current_user_id_session_check_failed before returning null
changes.whySafe: callers still receive the same nullable contract
